title: MasterTech: Hollow Beginning
body: MasterTech: Hollow Beginning - is a large modpack, covering a large number of topics. Starting with primitive technologies, ending with complex, expensive, magical and technical devices. In this modpack you will find a lot of Adventures, Industry, Magic, Hardcore, Space and interesting RPG with traveling through worlds, because there are more than 50! The game starts in Nether, in addition to this, even ordinary mobs can break, build blocks and find chests, and to protect from that you will need to build turrets, look for different ways to protect against monsters, and fight with a lot of bosses. There are also more than 1500 custom recipes. And you won't be confused in all this, because the modpack provides you with more than 1000 quests with detailed description that will guide you through all the mods to the final tools, armor and complex mechanisms.
